directions: Enter Gate A, turn right on Level 1 concourse, pass Food Court A, take ramp to Section 112. Approximately 5 minutes walk.
accessible_route: Use Gate A ramp entrance, follow accessible signage to Section 112 elevator access.

directions: Enter Gate A, Food Court A is immediately on your right, Level 1.
accessible_route: Flat path from Gate A entrance.

directions: Enter Gate A, turn left. Medical Station 1 is 100m on Level 1.
Enter Gate A, walk straight 150m along Level 1 concourse. Restrooms on your left near Section 105.
accessible_route: Flat accessible path from Gate A.

directions: Enter Gate C, turn left on Level 1 concourse, follow signs to Section 118. Take ramp up.
accessible_route: Use Gate C ramp, take elevator near Gate C to correct level.

directions: Enter Gate C, Food Court C is immediately ahead on Level 1.
accessible_route: Flat path from Gate C entrance.

directions: Exit Gate B, walk west along Andrew Young International Blvd toward GWCC. Fan Festival is in the Congress Center grounds. 10 minutes walk.
Exit Gate D, walk southwest along Northside Dr. Vine City MARTA Station is 8 minutes walk. Or take the free FIFA shuttle.
Enter North Gate, follow Level 1 concourse to the right. Section 105 entrance is 200m ahead.
accessible_route: Flat path with elevator access near North Gate.

directions: Enter North Gate, Hawks Nest Food Hall is on Level 1 North Concourse, 50m to your right.
Exit East Gate onto Occidental Ave S. Stadium Station is 150m north. 2 minute walk.
accessible_route: Paved path with elevator access at station.

directions: Enter South Gate, Medical Station 2 is on Level 2. Take elevator near South Gate.
accessible_route: Elevator from South Gate to Level 2.

directions: Enter Gate A, follow Level 1 concourse right. Section 108 is 250m ahead.
accessible_route: Flat concourse with elevator if needed.

directions: Exit Gate C, follow pedestrian walkway east. Station is 400m, 5 minute walk.
Enter Gate 1, follow Level 1 concourse left. Section 106 is 200m ahead.
Enter Puerta 1, follow Level 1 concourse. Section 108 is 300m along the north concourse.
accessible_route: Ramp access from Puerta 1, elevator to correct level.

directions: Exit Puerta 3, walk south on Calzada de Tlalpan. Metro Azteca station entrance is 200m ahead.
accessible_route: Paved sidewalk, elevator at metro station.
